intentSynonyms: change the details of custom instructions in chatgpt
update your custom instructions in chatgpt
description: Update ChatGPT custom instructions. Set what ChatGPT should know about you and how it should respond. Pass empty strings to clear instructions.

about_user.description: What you want ChatGPT to know about you

about_model.description: How you want ChatGPT to respond

enabled.description: Whether to enable custom instructions (default true)
